languages.text: "Не пойму, о чем вы толкуете, ваша светлость. Вы бы спросили кого посмышленее — я к таким разговорам не приучен".

traits.locale_text: "Не пойму, о чем вы толкуете, ваша светлость. Вы бы спросили кого посмышленее — я к таким разговорам не приучен".

languages.text: "I don't know what you're talking about, my {mf|lord|lady}. You should ask someone with quicker wits — I'm not used to such talk."
languages.original_text: "Не пойму, о чем вы толкуете, ваша светлость. Вы бы спросили кого посмышленее — я к таким разговорам не приучен".

traits.locale_text: "I don't know what you're talking about, my {mf|lord|lady}. You should ask someone with quicker wits — I'm not used to such talk."
"I don't know what you're talking about, my {mf|lord|lady}. You should ask someone with quicker wits — I'm not used to such talk."
"I don't know what you're talking about, my {mf|lord|lady}. You should ask someone with quicker wits — I'm not used to such talk."

languages.text: “我不太明白您的意思，大人。您该去问那些脑子灵光的人，我不太擅长这种话题。”
languages.original_text: "I don't know what you're talking about, my {mf|lord|lady}. You should ask someone with quicker wits — I'm not used to such talk."

traits.locale_text: “我不太明白您的意思，大人。您该去问那些脑子灵光的人，我不太擅长这种话题。”

languages.text: « Je vois pas de quoi vous voulez parler, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Vous feriez mieux de demander à quelqu'un de plus malin que moi. Ce genre de discussion, ça me dépasse. »
languages.original_text: "I don't know what you're talking about, my {mf|lord|lady}. You should ask someone with quicker wits — I'm not used to such talk."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois pas de quoi vous voulez parler, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Vous feriez mieux de demander à quelqu'un de plus malin que moi. Ce genre de discussion, ça me dépasse. »

languages.text: "Neden bahsettiğinizi bilmiyorum {mf|lordum|leydim}. Daha zeki birine sormalısınız. Ben böyle konuşmaları pek beceremem."
languages.original_text: "I don't know what you're talking about, my {mf|lord|lady}. You should ask someone with quicker wits — I'm not used to such talk."

traits.locale_text: "Neden bahsettiğinizi bilmiyorum {mf|lordum|leydim}. Daha zeki birine sormalısınız. Ben böyle konuşmaları pek beceremem."

languages.text: «No sé de qué habla, mi {mf|señor|señora}. Debería preguntarle a alguien más astuto. Yo no estoy acostumbrado a esas conversaciones».
languages.original_text: "I don't know what you're talking about, my {mf|lord|lady}. You should ask someone with quicker wits — I'm not used to such talk."

traits.locale_text: «No sé de qué habla, mi {mf|señor|señora}. Debería preguntarle a alguien más astuto. Yo no estoy acostumbrado a esas conversaciones».

languages.text: "Ich weiß nicht, wovon Ihr sprecht, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Das solltet Ihr jemanden fragen, der klüger ist ... ich bin solche Gespräche nicht gewohnt."
languages.original_text: "I don't know what you're talking about, my {mf|lord|lady}. You should ask someone with quicker wits — I'm not used to such talk."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß nicht, wovon Ihr sprecht, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Das solltet Ihr jemanden fragen, der klüger ist ... ich bin solche Gespräche nicht gewohnt."

languages.text: 「何を言っているのかわかりません、私の{mf|殿|殿様}。もっと機敏な人に聞いてください。私はそのような話に慣れていません。」
languages.original_text: "I don't know what you're talking about, my {mf|lord|lady}. You should ask someone with quicker wits — I'm not used to such talk."

traits.locale_text: 「何を言っているのかわかりません、私の{mf|殿|殿様}。もっと機敏な人に聞いてください。私はそのような話に慣れていません。」
